required_slots.proves: The manuscript section exists as finished prose, not scaffold or audit copy.
Argument sequence, transitions, and claims are coherent.
Final prose meets the intended register and does not contain process language.
Open source notes are resolved, demoted, or explicitly retained.

promotion_rule: Promotion requires all required files to exist and survive clearly labeled review or technical audit. A complete vault is necessary but not alone sufficient for expert-facing claims.
